chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.D-2303 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders as to non-prosecution of main petition, as duplicate set not supplied. 06.02.2018. This Constitutional Petition is called for hearing but neither petitioner nor his Counsel is present. No intimation received. Today case is fixed for orders as to non- prosecution of the main petition as duplicate set has not been supplied. This petition has been filed on 28.04.2016, since then nobody on behalf of the petitioner diligently pursuing this petition, which is dismissed for non-prosecution alongwith pending applications, if any. JUDGE JUDGE
